title: iris virescens subsp. bosniaca
intro: Iris virescens subsp. bosniaca, also known as the Bosnian green iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and inflammation. The health benefits of Iris virescens subsp. bosniaca include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
